title: Yellow Metallic Balloons - 5 Inch Decorative Latex Balloons for Birthday, Engagement, Wedding Parties - Pack of 50
features: Balloon Pack Include: You will receive Pack of 50 thicken 5 inch round Metallic Yellow balloons. Sufficient quantity to Surprise your loved ones that will be sure to bring them delight!!
High Quality Balloons: Balloons are environment friendly made of natural latex. These durable balloons have uniform thickness not easy to burst stay up for long time safe to use around kids.

Easy To inflate: These small 5 inch balloons can be inflated with air or helium. When filled with air balloons can keep its shape up to 15 hours or more. Metallic balloons can be reused for your next party

Multiple Occasions: Shiny Metallic 5 inch balloons to decorate parties of any theme. Ideal decoration accessories for people of all age. Party supplies for summer holiday decorations, weddings, birthday parties, Baby Shower decorations, engagement party, Back ground decoration, photo props and so on!!

Please Note: Balloons reach you flat, ready to inflate by you. Recommend to use pump to inflate the balloons. Try not to over fill them to avoid ballon burst. Children Recommended to use balloons under adult supervision. Keep away the uninflated or broken balloons from children reach. If you have any suggestions queries please dont hesitate to contact us !
description: Product Description Premium Metallic Party Decorative Balloons on a pink background! Enjoy your party ! Get creative and put a new spin on your traditional party décor! Glossy balloons to add to your decor for the holidays, Birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, and many more! These balloons are made of high-quality latex-thickened materials, which are durable and beautiful. Our Balloons are Non-toxic, reusable, and safe. The bright strong and colorful metallic chrome balloons are an ideal choice for every party Theme. Realistic party decoration with flying helium chrome balloons! Birthday decorations! A perfect gift to heighten your parties such as baby showers, gender reveals, bridal showers, bachelorette parties, anniversary parties, Christmas, graduation, prom, school events, and grand openings. Thick Shiny Metallic Party Balloons Decorate your desire place Bring so much delight to any party or fun gathering. Filling helium can achieve a long term floating effect For an amazing effect! Easy to use and difficult to burst. All time favorite for party planners. Premium Bright Colors for all ocassions Space for an amazing effects with vibrant color Let these vibrant balloons make a good impression on your guests and on your Kids too. Birthday party celebration! They Come in assorted colors and our gorgeous balloons can easily be matched to any party decoration. widely used These metallic balloons are widely used on our auspicious days with innovative ideas to create a beautiful environment.
